label: HVAC — Commissioning pass
description: CIBSE TM39 commissioning sequence — proportional flow balance, vibro-acoustic check, ventilation audit, full validator run. Used at handover when the model represents the as-built rather than the design intent.

steps.label: Verify fire dampers at compartment boundaries

notes: Run after the contractor's TAB (testing, adjusting, balancing) results are entered.
PressureRegimeValidator activates automatically when the healthcare profile is on.
